bubbles.text: Do you have the running shoes in size 42?
Yes! The Pro Runner is in stock in size 42 — 1,200,000 Toman, with free shipping.
It's already 15% off the original price. Want me to reserve a pair for you?

items.quote: Our Telegram support is fully automated now. The agent answers product questions instantly, day and night.
items.name: Sara M.

items.quote: Setup took ten minutes. Uploading our catalog and connecting Bale was effortless.
items.name: Reza K.

items.quote: Bringing our own OpenRouter key means we control the costs. Exactly what we needed.
items.name: Niloofar A.

items.q: Do I need technical skills to use it?
items.a: No. Create an agent in a few clicks, upload your data, and connect a channel.

items.q: How are AI token costs handled?
items.a: You bring your own OpenRouter key, and token costs are billed directly to your account. Vigent only charges for the platform.
Telegram, WhatsApp, Instagram, Rubika, Bale and a web widget — all in one dashboard.

items.q: Can I try it for free?
items.a: Yes — a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

cta.title: Build your smart agent today
cta.note: No credit card required — just your phone number
